jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Bombay Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
